title: Question: increase DETECTARRAY_MAX_INDEXES in V3Changed.cpp
body:
---


Author Name: **j briquet**
Original Redmine Message: 2243 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hello Wilson,

In my design, i am using a behavioral model which consists of assigning a register of 1024 bits. Because the reg length is above 256, verilator returned an error and suggested to recompile by increasing the parameter DETECTARRAY_MAX_INDEXES that I found in the file V3Changed.cpp. Because, I am not able to change the behavior model to break down in smallest register, I want to use the workaround of increasing the parameter to not flag an error. I wonder if there is a way to pass this parameter through a verilator command, or it's hard-coded in the tool after compilation ? Thanks for your support.

Best regards,
Jean-Pierre
